entities.name: convert_prompt.py
entities.context: Python script for converting prompts between different formats, located at N5/scripts/convert_prompt.py

entities.name: prompt conversion workflow
entities.context: 7-step process for converting prompts: Extract, Validate, Transform, Optimize, Write, Report

entities.name: format transformation
entities.context: Process of converting prompts between different structured formats (plaintext, XML, JSON, YAML)

entities.name: XML format
entities.context: Structured prompt format with semantic tags, supports nested contexts, preserves whitespace and formatting

entities.name: JSON format
entities.context: Structured prompt format in JSON notation

entities.name: YAML format
entities.context: Structured prompt format using YAML notation

entities.name: plaintext format
entities.context: Simple text format with minimal structure, variables marked as {{variable}}, sections separated by headers

entities.name: prompt variables
entities.context: Dynamic values in prompts marked with {{variable}} syntax

entities.name: Claude prompt format
entities.context: Specific XML-based prompt format used by Claude models

entities.name: ChatGPT prompt format
entities.context: Prompt format optimized for ChatGPT models

entities.name: Python
entities.context: Programming language used for the conversion script

entities.name: metadata preservation
entities.context: Option to preserve metadata during conversion using --preserve-metadata flag

relationships.context: Script implements the 7-step workflow for conversions
Workflow encapsulates the format transformation process
XML is one of the supported target/source formats for transformation
JSON is one of the supported target/source formats for transformation
YAML is one of the supported formats for transformation
Plaintext is a supported base format for transformation
Claude format is XML-based and shares structural characteristics
Variable syntax {{variable}} is specific to plaintext format
Script supports --preserve-metadata flag for retaining metadata during conversion
